items.content_html: 📃 • updated list of community themes & plugins for obsidian.md!
items.title: konhi/obsidian-community-list: 📃 • updated list of community themes & plugins for obsidian.md!

items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin for day planning and managing pomodoro timers from a task list in a Markdown note.
items.title: ebullient/obsidian-day-planner-og: An Obsidian plugin for day planning and managing pomodoro timers from a task list in a Markdown note.

items.content_html: This is an Obsidian plugin which can switch to the desired tab in about two actions without leaving the home position on the keyboard.
items.title: namikaze-40p/obsidian-tab-selector: This is an Obsidian plugin which can switch to the desired tab in about two actions without leaving the home position on the keyboard.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.
items.title: platers/obsidian-linter: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.

items.content_html: Open-source client-side code editor plugin for Obsidian.md - powered by LiveCodes.io
items.title: gapmiss/livecodes-playground: Open-source client-side code editor plugin for Obsidian.md - powered by LiveCodes.io

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin. Displays a word count or other statistic for each file, folder and vault in the File Explorer pane.
items.title: isaaclyman/novel-word-count-obsidian: Obsidian plugin. Displays a word count or other statistic for each file, folder and vault in the File Explorer pane.

items.content_html: Intermittent fasting tracker plugin for Obsidian.
items.title: vkostyanetsky/ObsidianFastimer: Intermittent fasting tracker plugin for Obsidian.

items.content_html: braincache obsidian plugin
items.title: XSPGMike/braincache_obsidian: braincache obsidian plugin

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to easily manage your plugins and themes inside Obsidian.
items.title: 4Source/vare-obsidian-plugin: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to easily manage your plugins and themes inside Obsidian.

items.content_html: Materialize Todoist tasks in Obsidian notes
items.title: jamiebrynes7/obsidian-todoist-plugin: Materialize Todoist tasks in Obsidian notes

items.content_html: Review your daily notes on their anniversaries, like "what happened today last year"
items.title: Kageetai/obsidian-plugin-journal-review: Review your daily notes on their anniversaries, like "what happened today last year"

items.content_html: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.
items.title: remotely-save/remotely-save: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.

items.content_html: a plugin for obsidian to publish your notes to github
items.title: CatCodeMe/ccm-publisher: a plugin for obsidian to publish your notes to github
ericbiewener/obsidian-plugin-monorepo

items.content_html: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).
items.title: nhaouari/obsidian-textgenerator-plugin: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).

items.content_html: Lets to use local llms in your Obsidian Vaults, create new texts from your prompts and crate texts based on your inputs
items.title: Sparky4567/obsidian_ai_plugin: Lets to use local llms in your Obsidian Vaults, create new texts from your prompts and crate texts based on your inputs

items.content_html: An plugin for Obsidian that translates note names to ease linking across many languages.
items.title: leolazou/obsidian-multilingual: An plugin for Obsidian that translates note names to ease linking across many languages.

items.content_html: Obsidian PDF export enhancement plugin
items.title: l1xnan/obsidian-better-export-pdf: Obsidian PDF export enhancement plugin

items.content_html: obsidian plugin to add attributes and context menu options to internal links
items.title: mdelobelle/obsidian_supercharged_links: obsidian plugin to add attributes and context menu options to internal links
